'''Elbara Nine''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] on the [[Cerean Reach/Legends|Cerean Reach]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was an icy world and home to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[GlitterFall]] base.<ref name="H&S" /> The planet was near a little-used [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] staging area.
